title: crotalaria oligostachya
intro: Crotalaria oligostachya, also known as the few-flowered crotalaria, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin infections, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria oligostachya typically involve drying the leaves or roots, then making infusions or decoctions for use in traditional medicine.
